page_metadata.biotools__summary: PlantiSMASH is a specialized extension of antiSMASH for the identification and analysis of biosynthetic gene clusters (BGCs) in plant genomes. It supports advanced plant-specific detection rules and features for comparative genomics, visualization, and more.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PlantiSMASH is a specialized extension of antiSMASH for the identification and analysis of biosynthetic gene clusters (BGCs) in plant genomes. It supports advanced plant-specific detection rules and features for comparative genomics, visualization, and more.
